CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-25-2006 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558 (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 612, NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND APPLICATION FOR HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER - TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. AN ATTACHMENT MAY BE ISSUED ONLY IN AN ACTION ON A CLAIM FOR MONEY BASED UPON A CONTRACT. PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT ALLEGES TORTIOUS CONDUCT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton, CSR# 1558 (212)
